templates.name: Emotional Pop Rock
templates.description: Full-band heartbreak MV with memorable chorus and cinematic performance shots.
templates.prompt_rules: Thai emotional performance, realistic cinematic lighting, consistent singer identity, strong chorus visuals.
templates.song_style: Thai pop rock ballad, emotional male vocal, full band, soaring final chorus

templates.name: Sad Cinematic
templates.description: Slow emotional story with soft subtitles, dark film look, and moody visuals.
templates.prompt_rules: cinematic Thai drama, restrained camera, soft shadows, emotional realism, no comedy tone.
templates.song_style: cinematic Thai heartbreak ballad, piano, soft pad, intimate vocal

templates.name: TikTok Viral
templates.description: Hook-first short-form workflow with bold subtitles and strong motion.
templates.prompt_rules: hook in first seconds, readable bold lyric moments, fast cuts, vertical-first composition.
templates.song_style: modern Thai pop, catchy hook, strong beat, social-ready chorus

templates.name: Night Drive
templates.description: Moody late-night road visuals with neon reflections and smooth movement.
templates.prompt_rules: night road, reflections, car interior, lonely city lights, smooth camera drift.
templates.song_style: night drive synth pop, emotional vocal, warm bass, neon atmosphere

templates.name: Isaan Indie
templates.description: Regional indie storytelling with natural warmth and grounded visuals.
templates.prompt_rules: natural Thai locations, sincere emotion, warm sunset, rural indie mood, no caricature.
templates.song_style: Isaan indie pop, acoustic guitar, warm vocal, gentle percussion

templates.name: Acoustic Heartbreak
templates.description: Minimal acoustic MV focused on lyrics, face, and intimate emotion.
templates.prompt_rules: minimal room, acoustic guitar, intimate vocal, soft window light, close facial emotion.
templates.song_style: Thai acoustic heartbreak ballad, fingerpicked guitar, intimate vocal
